author: jurok00
title: Окей !
content: Ну вот, хотя бы один из годных аудио проигрывателей, в котором можно спокойно слушать свою музыку, оффлайн, без всяких навязчивых ‘’ стримов’’ Спасибо

author: Jury St
title: Best music player
content:
Very simple and user friendly.
If you fix problem with shuffle( not correctly mixing tracks) I will buy a pro version.

author: Punitif
title: Was fine before
content: It was all great before one day it just stopped connecting to a WebDAV share, failing with Error -1022. The server is fine and works otherwise.
